name: credit-score-broker-correction
anchor: Layer 3 #12 (credit_score requirements — when needed + correction handling)
rationale: Broker initial intake states credit_score 720. Subsequent correction asserts 695 (refreshed credit pull came in lower). F1.CS canonical-map resolves to broker_correction (695). Layer 3: when is credit_score REQUIRED in canonical_map (always? above LTV threshold? for specific risk-band scenarios?); how is missing-credit_score handled?
notes: Two-event sequence. Layer 3 item #12 — credit_score field requirement semantic + correction precedence test.
